facebook.caption: POV: you wandered off Đường Trần Hưng Đạo and stumbled into Phu Quoc Centre. Local stalls, real crowds, zero resort markup. This is what shopping on the island actually looks like. 4.3 stars from 161 reviews says people keep coming back. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Ducking into Phu Quoc Centre on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Watch the stalls, the crowds, the haggling. This is the market the resort map didn't show you. 4.3 stars. 161 reviews. Go.

instagram.caption: POV: you found Phu Quoc Centre before the tour groups did. 4.3★, 161 reviews, real island market energy. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Walked into Phu Quoc Centre. Local stalls, actual locals. This is the market version of Phu Quoc nobody reels about.
